examples.title: Coreference with spaCy
examples.code:
import spacy
nlp = spacy.load('en_core_web_sm')
if 'neuralcoref' not in nlp.pipe_names:
    nlp.add_pipe('neuralcoref')
doc = nlp('Dr. Sharma published the paper. She received awards.')
print(doc._.coref_clusters)
examples.explanation: Loads neural coref model and prints resolved clusters
